playbook.intent: Open screen with unknown a11y -> WCAG 2.2 AA-compliant + remediation tickets opened.
playbook.scope: Designer or a11y specialist runs a 1-hour audit on one screen. Automated scan, manual heuristic pass, AT smoke test, ticket per violation, status tracker updated. Done when each violation has a ticket and the screen status is logged.

success-criteria.criterion: Each violation has a ticket with severity
Screen status updated in the a11y tracker
Pattern issues queued with design system

tasks.task: Run AI-assisted automated scan on the screen

stage.name: Manual heuristic

tasks.task: Walk WCAG 2.2 AA against the screen

stage.decision-gate: Advance only after the heuristic walk is complete.

stage.name: AT smoke
stage.intent: Test with NVDA + VoiceOver at minimum.
stage.decision-gate: Advance only when both screen-readers are tested.

stage.name: Ticket

tasks.task: Open a ticket per violation with severity

stage.decision-gate: Advance only when every violation has a ticket.

stage.name: Update tracker
stage.decision-gate: Done when tracker reflects the audit.

extra.value: [Trusting automated scans alone -> missing 30-40% of issues, No AT smoke -> the real users still cannot use it, Findings without tickets -> nothing changes]
['Did automated + manual + AT all run?', 'Are violations ticketed with severity?', 'Is the screen-status tracker current?']

{human: faion get-content a11y-audit-on-one-screen-1hr --format md, agent: faion get-content a11y-audit-on-one-screen-1hr --format context, json: faion get-content a11y-audit-on-one-screen-1hr --format json}
[{version: 1.0.0, date: 2026-05-20, note: Initial draft from F-059-063 chunk-05.}]
